notableEvents.label: Alek Thomas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alek Thomas grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Gabriel Moreno out at 2nd. Alek Thomas out at 1st.
